prs.title: Improve documentation and clarity in fetch pipeline
prs.body:
While exploring the fetch pipeline in ScanCode.io for GSoC 2026, I reviewed the data fetching logic and identified areas where documentation and clarity could be improved.

This PR:
- Enhances docstrings for key functions such as `get_request_session` and `fetch_http`
- Adds inline comments to clarify response handling and error cases

These improvements help in understanding how external data is fetched and processed, especially in the context of the advisory-based migration in VulnerableCode.

## Changes

- Improved docstrings for request session and HTTP fetch logic
- Added comments for response validation and error handling

## Checklist

- [x] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I have linked an existing issue above
- [ ] I have added unit tests covering the new code
- [x] I have reviewed and understood every line of this PR

prs.title: Update About section after graduation and copyright year
prs.body:
This PR updates the About section after the project graduation and updates the copyright year to 2026.

Fixes #653

prs.title: 🎵 Add sound effect when snake consumes food
Add Hello World program in Python
prs.body:
This PR adds a simple "Hello World" program in Python.
It is intended as a beginner-friendly contribution for Hacktoberfest 2025.

- File added: hello_world.py
- Language: Python

Looking forward to feedback and happy to make any improvements!

prs.title: Add Sujay Barui to Contributors list
prs.body: This is my first open-source contribution for Hacktoberfest! 🎉
